frontmatter.description: If you're going to restrict syncing OneDrive for Business libraries to specific domains only, you might want to first check, which domains are currently being used to synchronize data.

frontmatter.description: There are some cases in which you'd like to supress a flow in Power Automate for certain period of time. Be careful - turning it off doesn't always work as expected!

frontmatter.description: SharePoint doesn't provide the out-of-the-box option to import data from Excel file to existing list. There is, however, an interesting workaround which is based on PowerAutomate.

frontmatter.description: In that post I'd like to share some of the best practices for organizing meetings.

frontmatter.title: PowerShell tip - skip "Get"
frontmatter.description: In PowerShell you can skip the verb “Get” (at least for most cmdlets – it isn't working for things like Get-Process).
